Before Roy declined he put the phone up to his ear, a wicked little grin on his face as he continued to trail below your underwear, your brother on the phone. Blissfully unaware of your presence at Roy's house. Wonder what Jason would think about his best friend banging his little sibling?

"Hey, Jay-bird. What's up?" Roy's grin widened at the shock on your face, moving his thigh between your legs and brushing your sex against it. Trailing his hand back up to roam under your shirt.
